title: Verity Sharpe Landlords Wet Dream
description: “Charismatic and chaotic” comedian Verity Sharpe returns to Brighton Fringe with her debut show. Landlord’s Wet Dream is a bold and hilarious deep dive into the realities of renting—damp walls, exploitative landlords, and the looming threat of eviction— that offers a silver lining of laughter to the dark cloud that is temporary housing. Sharpe also squares up to the wider issue of profit-driven housing, wielding jaunty punk poetry, razor-sharp stand up, and anthemic original songs . Come for the comedy, stay for the biting capitalist critique. Or, come for the biting capitalist critique but be warned... you will laugh. Hard. “One of the most important show you’ll see all month”- Reviews Hub
